sections.paragraph:
Original: זרבּבל

Transliteration: zerûbbâbel

Phonetic: zer-oob-baw-bel'

BDB Definition:

Zerubbabel = "sown in Babylon"
  1. the grandson of king Jehoiachin and leader of the first group of returning exiles from Babylon

Origin: corresponding to H2216

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
